description_long: This is a compact, modern helicopter with a streamlined red fuselage and a transparent cockpit area. The helicopter features a prominent main rotor with long, slender blades and a tail boom ending in a vertical stabilizer and tail rotor. The cockpit is enclosed with large, curved windows, providing excellent visibility for the pilot and passengers. The landing gear consists of two sturdy, blue-tinted skids attached to the underside of the fuselage. A gold and red emblem is visible on the side, suggesting an official or emergency service role. The overall design is sleek, with minimal external protrusions and a focus on aerodynamic efficiency.
description: A sleek red helicopter with a transparent cockpit, blue-tinted landing skids, and a gold emblem on the side. It features a main rotor, tail rotor, and large curved windows.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red fuselage, transparent cockpit, blue-tinted skids, and a gold emblem on the door.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tail boom, tail rotor, and the width of the main rotor blades.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features as view 0, showing the cockpit and skids, but the emblem is less visible.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded cockpit windows, the main rotor hub, and the symmetry of the landing skids.
attribute_rotor_blades: The main rotor has two long, slender blades made of composite material, colored light blue with a slight sheen and no visible markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: The tail rotor is present at the end of the tail boom, featuring two short blades oriented vertically, colored light blue, with no visible protective shroud.
attribute_landing_skids: The landing skids are blue-tinted, tubular, and run parallel beneath the fuselage, connected by crossbars for stability.
attribute_cockpit_windows: The cockpit has large, curved, transparent windows wrapping around the front and sides, framed in red, with no visible tint or markings.
